summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new dashboard routes. All 3 new endpoints at /api/dashboard/* are working correctly with proper response formats. WebSocket real-time broadcasting is functional with correct message types (realtime_update and overview_update).
passed_tests: GET /api/dashboard/overview - Returns complete KPI metrics (total_visitors, visitors_change, conversions, conversions_change, bounce_rate, bounce_rate_change, avg_session_duration, session_duration_change, daily_traffic)
GET /api/dashboard/realtime - Returns real-time stats (active_visitors, active_sessions, visitors_timeline, sessions_by_source, top_pages)
GET /api/dashboard/heatmap-data?page_url=/pricing - Returns heatmap data (page_url, total_clicks, ctr, avg_scroll_depth, engagement_score, click_zones, click_points)
GET /api/dashboard/heatmap-data with different parameters - days and page_url parameters work correctly
WebSocket /api/ws/analytics - Basic connection and ping/pong functionality working
WebSocket realtime_update message type - Broadcasts active_visitors and active_sessions correctly
WebSocket overview_update message type - Broadcasts conversions data correctly
Analytics event broadcasting - Session start, pageview, and conversion events trigger appropriate WebSocket messages
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (9/9 tests passed). Dashboard endpoints: 100% success rate. WebSocket: 100% functional.
